name: pdf-to-llm
description: Convert PDF documents into LLM-friendly formats with intelligent extraction
author: chart-skills

modes.auto: Uses LLM if API key available, otherwise basic extraction

changes: Document metadata extraction (title, entity, date period)
Structured table extraction with headers and rows
Key figure extraction with labels, values, and units
Dual mode support: LLM (API key) and basic (no API key)
Parallel page processing for LLM mode
Page range selection for targeted processing
Support for JSON, JSONL, and Markdown output formats
Page-by-page processing with configurable summary ratio
